description: Lead Forensics identifies anonymous B2B website visitors using a large IP database, turning site traffic into named company leads with alerts and CRM routing.
overview: Lead Forensics reveals the companies behind anonymous website visits using a large IP database, delivering visitor alerts and routing high-value leads into CRM and marketing workflows.
what_is: Lead Forensics is a B2B website visitor identification tool. It matches anonymous traffic to companies using a large IP database, turning visits into leads that sales, marketing, and account teams can act on.
It is strongest at lead discovery, account management, and campaign analysis, with alerts when key prospects visit so teams can follow up fast. That speeds pipeline growth for B2B-focused businesses.

Lead Forensics integrates with CRM and marketing automation to route high-value leads to sales or nurture them in marketing. It is not a full marketing or email platform; it adds real-time visitor data to the tools you already use.
